notes:
1.0.31: 12-fix adversarial hardening pass across Opta firmware, the 4D display, and the app.

Opta: front-limit / home / actuator-feedback inputs moved onto the real Opta input terminals (I4-I8) so the safety interlock can actually read the switches; fan status LED corrected to LED_RELAY2 (it was lighting the relay-3 LED); stale plasma time-cap now cleared on plasma-off (no more false PLASMA_LOCAL_TIME_CAP); half-open display-link auto-recovery.

Display: Start-Clean is no longer locked out by a dead/absent electrode thermocouple; serial plasma-fire (A/C/F/I) now gated on the safety loop with a continuous HV-off net; pump-PWM duty clamp + serial-number and plate-sweep parser overflow clamps.

App: Data Log no longer records stale telemetry on a hung link; plasma-time single-sourced across the Config and Tip Charger tabs; unsaved config edits protected from background overwrite; server-side clamps on all pushed settings.
